- Description: feat(server): PR6b — order-sync audit log (StripeCheckoutLog) delegation endpoint
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  **What changed:**
  - `routes/stripe_order_sync.py` — `POST /stripe/order_sync?session_id=…` delegation endpoint (Rails invokes for `checkout.session.completed`)
  - `order_sync.py` — core audit-log logic: ledger-tagged sessions→StripeCheckoutLog, skip meta/untagged, dedup
  - `sheets/stripe_checkout_log.py` — StripeCheckoutLog sheet module (append + exists check)
  - `services/stripe_client.py` — extended for checkout session retrieval
  - `main.py` — router registration
  - `tests/test_order_sync.py` — 6 tests (ledger-tagged, meta-skip, untagged-skip, dedup, route validation, delegation)
  
  **Why:** Last endpoint group in the Edgar→dao_protocol extraction; mirrors Rails `meta_checkout_order_sync` for payment-critical Stripe flow.
  
  **GitHub:**
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/40
